summary: Iteration 3 (currency + 17-service catalog) verified end-to-end. Backend: 65/65 pytest tests pass across backend_test.py (31), test_multitenant.py (16) and a new test_currency_catalog.py (18). New tests cover 17-service seed presence, expected USD/INR currency mix, per-new-service required config fields (photography/videography/drone/anchor/dj/catering/medals/banners/first-aid/match-officials), platform_admin PATCH of service.currency USD<->INR, booking auto-population of currency (Anchor/MC INR 12000 -> booking.currency=='INR', total=12000; Photography USD 199 -> 'USD'), idempotent seed (no duplicate names, list count stable). Frontend: /services renders all 17 cards with category badges and correct symbols (₹4,500 / ₹12,000 / ₹18,000 / ₹350 / ₹1,500 INR and $8/$22/$35/$80/$120/$150/$199/$249/$299/$349/$499 USD). Indian locale grouping verified (₹4,500; en-IN active). Acme login -> Anchor/MC detail shows ₹12,000 base, booking submit -> /bookings row shows ₹12,000 INR (PENDING). Custom Medals detail shows 3 variants (gold $0/Included, silver -$2, bronze -$3) with USD live total. PlatformAdmin 'New service' modal has data-testid='svc-currency' Select with USD ($) default and INR option. NOTE: Found & fixed a runtime bug — /services/{id} crashed with 'fmtPrice is not defined' because ServiceDetail.jsx was missing the import; added import { fmtPrice } from '@/lib/currency' and verified service detail + booking flow now works.

minor.issue: Service named 'First Aid & Paramedic Stand' in seed but request spec referenced 'First Aid'/'First Aid & Medical'. Name is consistent with code; flag only as spec/test alignment.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing import for fmtPrice — page threw 'fmtPrice is not defined' on every /services/{id} render, completely blocking the booking flow. Fixed by adding `import { fmtPrice } from '@/lib/currency'`.

issues: Gold variant image returns broken/empty (Unsplash photo URL likely 404); silver/bronze render fine. Cosmetic only.
Professional Photography card omits category badge while other OTHER cards render the badge — likely conditional rendering nit; verify Services.jsx badge logic.

action_items: Verify fix to ServiceDetail.jsx (fmtPrice import added by testing agent) is acceptable; consider committing.
Optional: rename seed service 'First Aid & Paramedic Stand' or update product/test docs that reference 'First Aid & Medical' so naming is consistent.
Replace broken Unsplash URL for Custom Medals 'Gold finish' variant image.
Investigate why Professional Photography card lacks category badge while other OTHER-category cards show it.
critical_code_review_comments: ServiceDetail.jsx used fmtPrice without importing it — this is exactly the kind of regression that ESLint no-undef should have caught; consider enabling no-undef rule in CI to prevent shipping crashes.
server.py is now ~1700+ lines including seed_services with 17 large dicts; split out a /app/backend/seed_data/ module to keep server.py focused on routing.

Booking.currency is silently defaulted to 'USD' in the Booking model — if a future service stores a non-USD/INR currency the frontend symbol map will fall back to '$'. Validate Service.currency on POST/PATCH against CURRENCIES whitelist.
Idempotent seed inserts by name only; if an existing seed name has its currency/price changed in code, db will not reflect it (silent drift). Consider upsert-by-name when fields change.
Bookings list endpoint returns all rows for company_admin without pagination — could be slow once bookings grow.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested critical flows after fmtPrice import fix

test_credentials: admin@playsphere.com/admin123 (platform_admin); acme@example.com/acme123 (company_admin Acme Corp); viewer@playsphere.com/viewer123. All verified.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed (idempotent). Created several TEST_ prefixed bookings (Anchor/MC INR, Photography USD) and a TEST_ service for the PATCH currency test — all deleted in teardown. A few historical TEST_ bookings from prior iterations remain visible on the /bookings page (Trophies & Awards rows).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v` for full regression (65 tests across 3 files). The fmtPrice import on ServiceDetail.jsx was missing and was added by this testing agent — re-confirm in repo. Service named 'First Aid & Paramedic Stand' (not 'First Aid & Medical' as per request spec). data-testid additions confirmed: svc-currency on PlatformAdmin new-service modal; service-card-* on /services; booking-submit on detail page; bookings table rows still use total_price column with currency-formatted text. INR Indian grouping verified via Intl en-IN. Idempotent seed means tests must not assume fresh DB — use name lookups, not index-based access.
rca of the issue: Bug RCA — ServiceDetail.jsx crash: ServiceDetail.jsx referenced fmtPrice(service.currency,...) at lines 124 and 139 but the file never imported fmtPrice from '@/lib/currency'. React rendered the component and threw ReferenceError: fmtPrice is not defined, surfacing as 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay and blanking out the booking form. Repro: navigate to /services/{any-id}. Mitigation: added `import { fmtPrice } from '@/lib/currency';` near the existing lucide-react import. Verified service detail renders ₹12,000 for Anchor/MC, booking submits, and /bookings shows the INR row.
